inputs.titre: Édit de Saint-Germain autorisant le culte protestant (avec restrictions)

reason: The image depicts a scene that could plausibly represent advisors around King Louis XIV discussing the Édit de Saint-Germain. The clothing, objects (parchment, quills, candlesticks), and overall atmosphere seem consistent with the mid-17th century. There are no immediately obvious anachronisms or fantastical elements. The lack of visible modern materials and architecture is a positive sign.
